input.reasoning:
Selected Flight 0 (American AA 1565) at $267 per person for best value - direct flight with reasonable departure time (3:15 PM) allowing family to arrive in Miami by evening. Total flight cost: $1,068 for 4 travelers.

Chose The New Yorker Miami Hotel at $562 total (5 nights) for excellent family value - it has the outdoor pool and kid-friendly amenities requested, plus breakfast included, free parking, and restaurant on-site. This is the most budget-friendly option that meets all family needs.

Activities scheduled to match interests: Miami Seaquarium (specifically requested), multiple beach visits, ocean views boat rental, family club activities, pool time at hotel, and several family-friendly seafood restaurants with ocean views. All activities distributed across the 6-day trip with realistic timing and no conflicts.

Total cost breakdown:
- Flights: $267 × 4 = $1,068
- Hotel: $562 (5 nights)
- Activities: $1,420 (includes meals and attractions)
- Total: $3,050

This leaves $950 buffer under the $4,000 budget for additional expenses, souvenirs, and contingencies. All hard constraints met: correct dates (Aug 1-6), Boston to Miami, 4 travelers, family-friendly with pool, kids club options, beach access, Miami Seaquarium, seafood restaurants, and ocean views.
input.final_message_to_user:
Perfect! I've created a wonderful 6-day Miami family vacation for 4 travelers that stays well within your $4,000 budget at just $3,050. 

You'll fly direct on American Airlines, arriving in Miami on August 1st at 6:58 PM. Your hotel, The New Yorker Miami Hotel, offers everything your family needs: outdoor pool, kid-friendly amenities, free breakfast, free parking, and an on-site restaurant.

Your itinerary includes all your requested experiences: a visit to Miami Seaquarium, multiple beach days, ocean views boat rental, kids club activities, pool time, and several family-friendly seafood restaurants with beautiful ocean views. Activities are perfectly spaced throughout your trip with no conflicts, giving your family plenty of time to relax and enjoy Miami together.

You'll have nearly $950 remaining in your budget for souvenirs, extra meals, and any spontaneous adventures. Have a fantastic trip! 🌴🐬🏖️
